tasks.title: QA/docs consolidation for promoter/code contract batch
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: run consolidated validation for this batch, publish dated handoff with exact command outputs, and sync docs/CHANGELOG.md + touched implemented-now notes. No behavior changes unless needed to fix failing gates.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- registrar.controller.test.ts registrar.service.test.ts && pnpm --filter web test -- registrar-client.test.ts registrar-contract-inventory.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
